Мастер фраза для определения максимально: Well, that old thing almost tore me to pieces for its gold! gold! gol
dialogs_fagop_home_Боже! Кажется оторвал: Gosh! I think I managed to break away from them!
dialogs_fagop_home_\"Лачуга подходит под: (The shack matches Meri's description... Hope this is right!)
dialogs_fagop_home_Никогда бы не подумал: I'd never thought frogs can be this fast...
dialogs_fagop_home_Ох! И так больно бить: Ugh! It hurts so bad! I think I broke a rib!
dialogs_fagop_home_Эм... Мистер Фагоп? Э: Eh... Mister Fagop? Is that you?
dialogs_fagop_home_Мистер Фагоп, вы толь: Mister Fagop, just don't get mad, will you?
dialogs_fagop_home_Я не хотел \"топтать:
I had no intentions to "trample on the sacred swamps", or 
whatever... I just came to talk!
dialogs_fagop_home_Не бойся, человек, те: Be not afraid, human, you are safe here.
dialogs_fagop_home_Ну нет... нет-нет-нет: Hell nah... No-no-no, this is too much!
dialogs_fagop_home_Ты все-таки попался с:
You did stumble into the guards, after all. 
You're not as sneaky as you think.
dialogs_fagop_home_И тем не менее он яви: But he is here nonetheless, Merigold.
dialogs_fagop_home_Видишь? Я же говорила:
See? I told you. 
Eirik is literally the most stubborn of men.
He's just what we need.
dialogs_fagop_home_Нет-нет... Этого прос:
No... no! It simply can't be! 
You were able to come here for your damned leeches 
by yourself all along!
dialogs_fagop_home_Пиявками? Ах, да... Н: Leeches? Ah, yes... Of course I could! I'm right here.
dialogs_fagop_home_То есть вся это идиот:
So this whole story was some idiotic trickery?! 
Another "handy" plan of Merigold's!
dialogs_fagop_home_Не то, чтобы сильно х: Not that it's handy. You can say I improvised.
dialogs_fagop_home_Зачем?! Чего ты хотел: But why?! What was it all for?
dialogs_fagop_home_Я не знаю, про что ты:
Human, I do not comprehend what you're saying... 
Merigold just wanted me to see you, and that is it. 
Why all the shouting?
dialogs_fagop_home_Что? Ты хотела меня с: What? You wanted us to meet? That's the reason?
dialogs_fagop_home_\"Слова\", Мэригольд,: "Words", Merigold, "Words! You familiar with the concept!?"
dialogs_fagop_home_\"Привет, Эйрик, удач:
"Hi Eirik, good that you're here, I just wanted to introduce you to 
Fagop, an old friend of mine!"
dialogs_fagop_home_Не нужно ничего выдум:
There was no need to stage it, lie, or trick me! 
Or to send me to the swamps God knows what for!
dialogs_fagop_home_Ох, ладно. Хочешь, чт: Oh, okay then. Want me to say what we need?
dialogs_fagop_home_Ты должен перейти чер:
You've got to cross the bridge and get to the human settlement, 
and then get an access to one very important alchemical device.
dialogs_fagop_home_Да! На клан обрушилас:
Yes! The disease has struck our clan. It doesn’t attack the adults, 
but it attacks the children only... We need a cure.
dialogs_fagop_home_Вы издеваетесь?! Это: Are you insane?! Is this a joke?
It’s madness! You just... dump all of this on me! 
And I’m the one who’s supposed to deal with it?!
dialogs_fagop_home_Какие шутки? Речь иде: This is no joke! It is our children's lives we're talking about!
dialogs_fagop_home_Нет никаких детей! Мэ: There are no children! Merigold must've made them up!
dialogs_fagop_home_Уверяю тебя, это не т: It is true, I assure you. There's a murrain in the village!
dialogs_fagop_home_Да откуда мне знать?: How do I know? Maybe she put you up to it, too!
dialogs_fagop_home_Дьявол, мне вешают ла: Damn it, I'm fed up with this bullshit, and I... shit!
dialogs_fagop_home_Все, Мэри. Я больше н:
I'm not playing your games anymore, Mary. 
Have a nice tea party!
dialogs_fagop_home_Я знаю безопасную тро:
I know the safe pathway to the forest. 
You want to come back safe?
dialogs_fagop_home_\"Дьявол! Ребро все е: (Damn it! My rib is still hurting!)
dialogs_fagop_home_Он найдет то, что вам: He'll find what you need. Promise.
